features: Portable Readers: These metal compact reading glasses are very convenient to use and sturdy, comfortable to wear. You can put them in your wallet, clip them in your shirt pocket, put them in your jeans pocket, as well as in your bag and car, and so on. When you travel or go out, they are perfect reading glasses for men and women.

Pocket Glasses of High Quality: The ultralight reading glasses are equipped with metal spring hinge allows the glasses to expand slightly outward at a 45 degree angle, making them suitable for all face shapes and won't pinch your face. The frame passed 10,000 opening and closing tests. Durable and comfortable, not as fragile as supermarket glasses.

Blue Light Blocking Reading Glasses: The pen reading glasses are made of blue light blocking lens, they are not only the eyeglasses to read books and papers, but also can be used to watch TV, browse computer, tablet and smart phone. These slim readers can filter 100% of UVA and UVB rays, blocking harmful blue light coming from digital device.

Convenient Reader Glasses Set: You can get 2 pairs of blue light blocking reading glasses at a cheap price. You can place them separately in different reading areas, or use one pair of glasses and the other as a backup. Every pair Compact reading glasses is equipped with a pen clip tube case, can be clipped onto the pocket to prevent loss, nice and fashion.

Hubeye Satisfaction Assurance: This is the perfect gift for friends, parents, grandparents, and relatives! Buy with confidence, we insist on paying attention to product quality. You have no risk of trying these glasses, we provide exclusive one-on-one customer service and a 30 day refund guarantee for buyers!
description: Product Description Hubeye Reading Glasses For a long time, we have been adhering to the concept of "MAKE PROFESSIONAL GLASSES WITH PROFESSIONAL HEART", bringing more fashionable and novel reading glasses to our customers without losing the traditional concept. Our reading glasses are made of high-grade materials, but the cost is much lower. We are direct sales from the factory, our reading glasses do not require additional expenditure by the buyer. This reading glasses not only blocks blue light, but also has an avant-garde frame design concept. If you need a pair of reading glasses. You can trust us. THESE HIGH QUALITY READING GLASSES ARE MADE OF SUPER DURABLE MATERIAL, FASHION AND COMFORTABLE HUBEYE ULTRA-THIN PORTABLE READING GLASSES WILL PROTECT YOUR EYES AND BRING YOU A CLEAR VISION Trustworthy reasons: Each type of reading glasses is inspected before being sold. Use high-quality materials, colorless, odorless, and non-allergic to wear. You speak, we listen. We continue to improve product quality and design to provide Hubeye fans. We are a growing company and we appreciate every purchase. We work hard to ensure our customers have a satisfying shopping experience. Whether a product meets or exceeds your expectations, we love learning about products to make us better!
